title: Section — Site-Specific Safety Plan
description: The structured inputs to a site-specific safety plan, harvested from the documents (owner safety requirements, Division 01 35 00, hazardous-materials reports, drawings). Organizes identified hazards, required programs, PPE, and emergency info so a safety/EHS tool can generate the SSSP and JHAs. The model collects and structures requirements; it does not author the plan or assess adequacy.

hazards.description: Site/scope hazards identified in the documents (e.g. asbestos, lead, silica, fall, confined space, energized work, excavation).

control_noted.description: Control/mitigation stated in the source, verbatim.

required_programs.description: OSHA / owner-required safety programs called out (e.g. fall protection, HazCom, confined space, LOTO, excavation, respiratory, EM 385-1-1 for federal).

competent_persons_required.description: Roles the documents require on site (e.g. competent person for excavation, fall protection).

owner_safety_requirements.description: Verbatim owner/contract safety requirements with provenance.
